name: @johpaz/hive-db
description: Motor de base de datos embebido, local-first y agent-native: event-log inmutable, proyecciones deterministas, búsqueda híbrida BM25+ANN y grafo de consentimiento.

scripts.build:native: napi build --platform --release --manifest-path ../../crates/hivedb-napi/Cargo.toml --output-dir . && mv index.js native.cjs && rm -f index.d.ts
scripts.build: napi build --platform --release --manifest-path ../../crates/hivedb-napi/Cargo.toml --output-dir . && mv index.js native.cjs && rm -f index.d.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.preversion: napi build --platform --manifest-path ../../crates/hivedb-napi/Cargo.toml --output-dir . && mv index.js native.cjs && rm -f index.d.ts && git add .
